BettingMarketSplitID.description: The unique ID assciated with the betting split

BettingMarketID.description: The unique ID associated with the betting market

BettingOutcomeTypeID.description: The unique ID associated with this BettingOutcomeType

BettingOutcomeType.description: The name of BettingOutcomeType (e.g. Home; Away; Under; Over)

BetPercentage.description: Percentage of bets placed on a specific outcome

MoneyPercentage.description: The percentage of the money placed in wagers on this market taken by this type of bet

Created.description: The date and time this betting split was created in US Eastern Time

LastSeen.description: The date and time this set of values was last seen
